verbatim_quote: the results showed that montmorillonite adsorbed more Cs than illite and kaolinite under all tested conditions.
reasoning: Comparative claim proven verbatim; the uncovered 'high adsorption capacity' is trivially entailed by outperforming two other clays.

verbatim_quote: It was found that the Cs adsorption capacity of bentonite was higher than that of SiO2.
reasoning: CALIBRATION SIGNAL (same pattern as paper1 t23/t24/t30/t32): pipeline flat unsupported, but the arbiter proof supports the 'Kunipia-F bentonite superior to SiO2' component. The other components (contains montmorillonite; Ca- vs Na-bentonite; inorganic-modified) are unshown. Multi-component claim with one proven part = partial, not unsupported.

verbatim_quote: The highest cesium Kd was observed on zeolite due to its high CEC and amounted to 4.05 mg/L at pH 7.
reasoning: CALIBRATION SIGNAL: pipeline flat unsupported, but 'zeolite shows the highest overall sorption' is proven verbatim (zeolite >= glauconite > bentonite > diatomite). Only 'weathered biotite is the best clay material' is unsupported. Partial, not unsupported.
